info.title: Ecommerce-buildTime
info.description: API documentation for the Ecommerce-buildTime platform, providing endpoints for managing products, orders, and user accounts.

tags.name: Products
tags.description: Operations related to product management including creation, retrieval, update, and deletion of product listings.

tags.name: Orders
tags.description: Endpoints for order processing, tracking, and management.

tags.name: Users
tags.description: User account operations including registration, authentication, and profile management.

post.description: Register a new user by providing required user details. Upon successful registration, returns the created user profile.

example.message: The provided user data is invalid or incomplete.
A user with the given email or username already exists.
An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

post.summary: Place a new order for a user
post.description: Place a new order on behalf of a specified user. Returns the details of the placed order upon success.

example.message: The order placement request data is invalid or malformed.

details.issue: Order items array is required and cannot be empty

example.message: The specified user for placing the order was not found.
An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

get.summary: Retrieve details of a specific order
get.description: Retrieve detailed information about an order specified by its unique identifier.

example.message: The order ID supplied is invalid.
No order found with the specified ID.
An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

post.summary: Add an item to the user's cart
post.description: Add a new item to the shopping cart of the specified user. Returns the updated cart contents.

requestBody.description: Details of the item to add to the cart

example.message: The cart item details provided are invalid.

details.issue: Quantity must be a positive integer

example.message: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

get.summary: Get the current cart of a user
get.description: Retrieve the current shopping cart contents of the specified user.

400.description: Invalid user ID in cart request

example.message: The user ID supplied for cart retrieval is invalid.
An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

get.summary: Track shipping status for an order
get.description: Retrieve the current shipping status and location details of the specified order using its unique identifier. Returns tracking information to help the user monitor shipment progress.

404.description: Order not found with the specified ID

example.message: No order found with the given orderId.
An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

post.summary: Add a new product to the catalog
post.description: Create a new product entry by providing detailed product information. On success, returns the created product details with generated identifiers.

requestBody.description: New product information to add to the catalog.

example.name: Wireless Earbuds
example.description: Noise-cancelling in-ear wireless earbuds with Bluetooth 5.2

example.message: Product data is missing required fields or contains invalid values.

details.issue: Price must be a positive number

409.description: Product with the same SKU already exists

example.message: A product with the given SKU already exists in the catalog.
An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

post.description: Accept incoming payment event notifications from external payment gateways, process the payload, and update payment status accordingly.

requestBody.description: Payment event payload sent by the payment gateway.

example.message: The payment webhook payload is invalid or missing required fields.
Payment could not be completed.
An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

post.description: Start a new payment process by submitting payment details. On success, returns payment confirmation and transaction details.

requestBody.description: Information required to start the payment process.

example.message: One or more payment details are missing or invalid.

402.description: Payment could not be processed or was declined

example.message: The payment transaction was declined by the processor.

details.issue: Payment was declined by the issuing bank

example.message: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

gatewayResponse.description: Response message from the payment gateway.

transactionId.description: Transaction identifier provided by the payment gateway.

status.description: Current status of the payment transaction.

totalAmount.description: Total amount for the order before discounts.

createdAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the order was created.

totalDiscount.description: Total discount applied to the order.

currency.description: Currency code for the order amounts (ISO 4217).

userId.description: Identifier of the user who placed the order.

items.description: List of items included in the order.

payableAmount.description: Final amount to be paid after discounts.

updatedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the order was last updated.

country.description: Country code of the user (ISO 3166-1 alpha-2).

createdAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the user account was created.

preferredCurrency.description: Preferred currency code of the user (ISO 4217).

active.description: Indicates if the user account is active.

updatedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the user information was last updated.

rating.description: Average customer rating of the product (1-5).

available.description: Indicates if the product is currently available.

description.example: Ergonomic wireless mouse with adjustable DPI settings.

currency.description: Currency code for the product price (ISO 4217).

category.description: Category under which the product is listed.

stock.description: Number of items currently in stock.

price.description: Original price per unit before discount

finalPrice.description: Final price per unit after discount

quantity.description: Number of units added to the cart

price.description: Original price per unit before discount

finalPrice.description: Final price per unit after discount

lastUpdated.description: Timestamp when the tracking info was last updated

courierPartner.description: Name of the courier service partner

trackingId.description: Tracking number assigned by the courier

currency.description: Currency code used for the cart

userId.description: Unique identifier of the user owning the cart

items.description: List of items currently in the cart

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the cart was last updated

amount.description: The total amount to be paid in the specified currency.

orderId.description: Unique identifier for the order associated with this payment.

paymentMethod.description: Method of payment used by the customer, e.g., credit card, PayPal.

paymentGateway.description: The payment gateway processor handling the transaction.

country.description: Country where the user is located, specified as ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 code.

phone.description: User's phone number including country code.

preferredCurrency.description: User's preferred currency for transactions, ISO 4217 code.

active.description: Indicates whether the user account is currently active.

userType.description: Type or role of the user, e.g., admin, customer.

createdAt.description: Date and time when the payment was created, in ISO 8601 format.

orderId.description: Identifier of the order associated with the payment.

paymentId.description: Unique identifier for this payment transaction.

currency.description: Currency code used for the payment.

transactionId.description: Identifier of the transaction provided by the payment gateway.

status.description: Current status of the payment transaction.

createdAt.description: Date and time when the product entry was created, ISO 8601 format.

price.description: Price of the product in the specified currency.

rating.description: Average user rating for the product.

available.description: Availability status indicating if the product is in stock.

description.example: Ergonomic wireless mouse with adjustable DPI settings.

currency.description: Currency code for the product price.

category.description: Category to which the product belongs.

stock.description: Number of units currently in stock.

updatedAt.description: Date and time when the product information was last updated, ISO 8601 format.

error.description: Short description of the error type encountered by the client

message.description: Detailed message explaining the client error

status.description: HTTP status code representing the error

timestamp.description: Timestamp when the error occurred in ISO 8601 format

path.description: Request path that caused the error

requestId.description: Unique identifier for tracking the specific request

errorCode.description: Application specific error code indicating the error type

details.description: List of detailed issues related to the error

field.description: Field name related to the error detail

issue.description: Description of the specific issue for the field

error.description: Short description of the server error encountered

message.description: Detailed message explaining the server error

status.description: HTTP status code representing the server error

timestamp.description: Timestamp when the server error occurred in ISO 8601 format

requestId.description: Unique identifier for tracking the specific request
